description: Fail-closed WRITE allowlist for the Automation engine: the only (doctype, field) targets a rule's SET_FIELD / child-row action may write, scoped by grain. Ships EMPTY — a field not listed here cannot be set, period. Grain axes left blank act as a wildcard for that axis. System Manager curates this surface; ops author rules within it.

fields.label: Target DocType
fields.description: DocType the field lives on, e.g. CRM Lead, CRM Lab Profile.

fields.label: Fieldname
fields.description: The fieldname on the target doctype.

fields.label: Child Table Field
fields.description: For child-row writes only: the CRM Lead child-table fieldname this row writes into, e.g. custom_lab_profile. Blank for the parent (lead). Phase-2 child writes.

fields.label: Is Row Key
fields.description: For a child-row target: mark the field that is this child's natural upsert key. Phase-2 child writes.

fields.label: Section
fields.description: Routing section, e.g. lead / plan / lab. Parent (lead) vs child sections.

fields.label: Vertical
fields.description: Grain axis. Blank = wildcard for this axis.

fields.label: Group
fields.description: Grain axis. Blank = wildcard for this axis.

fields.label: Program
fields.description: Grain axis. Blank = wildcard for this axis.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Fail-closed: a field is writable only while this is ticked.

name: CRM Automatable Field
